release_notes:
- CRITICAL FIX: Generated Excel reports were missing ALL grain-size / Atterberg graphs on the SS sheets (and Excel showed a 'Removed Records' repair dialog when opening the report). Reports now generate with every graph intact.
- Fix: Excel no longer reports repaired/removed merged cells on the borehole log sheets.
- New 260629 report templates (Government and Private) are bundled and selectable in the Excel export dialog.
